feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Production Order printing on Pick list
entry.content:
Hi,

Requirement: Production order has to be printed on picklist while doing Staging. We are following scope id 3DV and Doc type for Outbound delivery for this process is DOG1. Currently this seems to be unavailable on picklist, If it is possible then please suggest the process .

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No Option to choose Item Category "U" - Stock Transfer and "L" - Subcontracting in "My Purchase Requ
entry.content: No Option to choose Item Category "U" - Stock Transfer and "L" - Subcontracting in "My Purchase Requisition" App

entry.title: BOM Should Not Create For Boughtout Material Currently no restriction in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4 HANA system allow to create BOM for Boughtout Material but we do not want to create BOM form Boughtout Material.

How can we restrict the same in SAP S/4 hana Public cloud.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Error ' Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: "
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While performing the Staging process for a production order, I am using "stage material for production order" app. However, I am encountering the following error.(SAP Public cloud)

Could you please help me understand the cause of this issue and guide me on how to resolve it?

Thank you.
Kiran

entry.title: How to download Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation result or Output Spools in bulk ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP 

When SAP Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation job is run, it generates lots of reports as spool , we need the spool to be downloaded as is required by auditor for FX calculation verification which spool has the data but after the run it generates 100s of output report which is impossible to download every month.

Request you support for way to get the spool data over email or downloaded in bulk in one single archive or a SAP report that provides the same information.

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing error: Mandatory condition TTX1 is missing
entry.content:
In my sales order, I get the error "Pricing error: Mandatory condition TTX1 is missing".

 

In my customer master data, I have maintained tax classification "0 - Tax Exempt"

 

In my product master data, I have maintained TTX1 Exempt in VATreturn (0):

 

Why am I still getting an error?

entry.title: Key User Extensibility Fields for Bill of Material not available in SAP BOM Migration template ?
entry.content:
We have created a custom field and published it and now it appears in the components details in the app Change Bill of Material but in the Migration Template for object Material BOM the created custom field is not showing

 

How to maintain custom fields in the Migration Cockpit for object BOM ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Standard App/Report for Weekly Production
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We are using S/4HANA Public Cloud and looking a standard way to get a Weekly Production Report.

Ideally, the report should show:
Work Center
Material Produced
Quantity Produced
Date Produced

Is there a specific Fiori App/Report that provides this data in a weekly view? 

Any recommendations on the standard app for this?

Thanks

entry.title: Manual Rework activity appearing in production Manage Your Solution
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

After the 2602 upgrade, we noticed that a Manual Rework activity is appearing in the Manage Your Solution app in the Production system, but it is not visible in the Quality/Test system.

When we click on Action Required, it shows that certain master data needs to be set up. However, this master data has already been maintained in both the Q and P systems.

Could you please advise:

  1. Is any action required from our side, even though the master data is already maintained?
  2. Why is this Manual Rework activity appearing only in Production after the 2602 upgrade?

For reference, we have attached the relevant screenshot.

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: How to schedule jobs to run every 30 minutes instead of every 3 hours with batch-based triggers
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support, 

 

In the Manage Situation Types - Extended Application, the selection for recurrence interval for batch based job scheduling is currently only 3, 6, 12, 24 hours, but we require the interval time of 30 minutes. 

Can this 'Repeat Interval' of 30 minutes be chosen. 

 

Thank you. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST NVOICE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

we are unable to billing document as it shows no journal entry.

entry.title: Periode verschieben für Buchungskreis in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hallo, 

ich arbeite mich gerade in die Public Cloud ein, wie verschiebe ich die Periode für einen entsprechenden Buchungskreis?

entry.title: Need Approval workflow for Depreciation Run
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. We need an approval process for depression runs. There is no standard process for this. Is there any workaround in S4HANA Public Cloud?

Could you please let me know how to set up the approval process?

Thanks & Regards,

MDNRAO

entry.title: Credit check result details not shown with error reaction at delivery (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are using credit check at the delivery step and our reaction type is D (Like B-with exceeded limit) at the configuration 101518-Define Automatic Credit Control. 

But while creating delivery at public cloud with this configuration do not give the details for error message. We need obstruct the saving of delivery.  

Already there is a note for S/4HANA  and solution is to Modifying the method if_ex_badi_sd_cm~fscm_display_credit_messages, but we need this modification for public cloud project. And looking from another screeen and calculating the limits is not a feasible solution. We need option 2. This is a important step for our go-live date.   

Here the note and community link for S/4HANA solution: 

SAP community answer: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/static-credit-check-during-delivery-not-showing-amount-exceeded-fscm/qaq-p/12670231 

Sap note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2871140 

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Create credit check relevant sales order/delivery document 
  1. Try to save the document 
  1. Receive VM010 error message: "Credit check SAP Credit Management failed Credit Segment xxxx of partner yyyyy" 

Thanks in advance for your support!

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram  @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM Custom logic not working for changing delivery quantity (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We need to use LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM  logic to change item quantity at delivery bu when we implemented the logic it change the data at backend and cds views but at the screen G_LFIMG value stands constant. 

We implemented custom logic as below: 

 

After we created the delivery quantity still seen as 3 at main screen 

Bu at picking tab of item LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM worked and changed quantity to 1 

Even in the cds views values are changed to 1 but still G_LFIMG field seems as 3 

 

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: E-invoicing France : field to store electronic address in BP
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Where values from Routing Code and Suffix/Addressing Line Code are stored in France eDocuments to S/4HANA Public Cloud?

How can we fulfill this tags and configure it accordingly?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ML not active in material master at sap s/4hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would appreciate your support and insights regarding the issue I am currently facing.

We are experiencing a problem where Material Ledger is not active in the Material Master (Accounting 1 view) after adding a new plant. After further investigation, we found that when extending the material to the new plant, the Value Update and Quantity Update indicators were not properly maintained in the material type settings.

My questions are:

Is it still possible to activate Material Ledger for materials that have already been created/extended to the new plant?

What would be the recommended approach to resolve this issue without creating a new material?

Is a configuration change required in customizing (for example in SAP S/4HANA or SAP ERP, depending on the system), or would adjusting the material type and re-extending the material be sufficient?

Additional information:

The new plant has been successfully created.

The material has already been extended to the plant.

The issue is specifically related to Material Ledger not being active in the Accounting 1 view.

Any best practice recommendations or similar experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Unassigned Cost Center despite assignment in 1~ Standard Hierarchy in Manage Global Hierarchies.
entry.content:
Hi,

Cost center is assigned with 1~ Standard Hierarchy node.

In Manage Global Hierarchy, cost center CA10100000 is still unassigned making the 1 Hierarchy Inactive. 

Error: Standard hierarchy 1 cannot be activated. Some cost centers are unassigned. Check the Unassigned Master Data tab page. 

Have anyone encountered this kind of issue, how did you correct this? Thanks.

Regards,

Ruby

entry.title: Group Reporting - Change of Local currency from Functional Currency to Company code Currency
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert Team,

Present SAP setup in group reporting at version  level Local currency source is blank and is used across all consolidation units in the SAP system. That means at consolidation unit level local currency is assigned with Functional currency by default.

As per the change in reporting requirements in S4HANA, we would like to change Functional currency to a different currency for some of the entities. We do not want to carry this change to Group Reporting and would like to switch to company code currency in Group Reporting at version level across all consolidation units so that the local currency at consolidation unit will continue to be the same as earlier but source will shift from FC to CC.

 

Can we freely do this change in GR version in any period since we are not changing the currency but changing the source.

We are preparing to change the historical data in S4HANA for the units where FC is changed, which may not have impact in GR if we shift to FC to Company code currency

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need alternative CDS view that allows us to access the history of material prices
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need an alternative CDS view to access the history of material prices for creating a Z report on period-wise standard cost and moving average cost of a material valuation.

Could you please help to identify which CDS view can fulfill this requirement?

Thank you!
